---
title: "Victoria"
---

## Victoria

**Dates:** 1819-1901

### Description

Queen of Great Britain and Empress of India

### Letters

- Letter from Feb 4th  [1901]
- Letter from Sept 26th 1899
- Letter from Novr 6 th [1869]
- Letter from [July 1853]
- Letter from August 6, 1838

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
